creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #1)

For reference:

Even main does not have GCC_4.5.0 in /lib/libgcc_s.so.1 :

# strings /lib/libgcc_s.so.1 | grep GCC_ | more
GCC_3.0
GCC_3.3
GCC_3.3.1
GCC_3.4
GCC_3.4.2
GCC_3.4.4
GCC_3.5
GCC_4.0.0
GCC_4.2.0
GCC_4.3.0
GCC_4.6.0
